The Process

Simple from start to finish.

1

Send a Photo

Tap the text button, snap a photo of your glove, and tell us what it needs. We'll get back to you fast.

2

Drop It Off

We'll send a firm quote and set up a convenient drop-off time. No surprises, ever.

3

Back in the Game

Most repairs done in 3–5 days. Picked up fully conditioned, shaped, and game-ready.

Services & Pricing

Transparent pricing.
No hidden fees.

Premium USA leather lace on every job. Every glove treated like it matters — because it does.

Glove Spa

Deep clean, premium conditioning, and component tightening. Laces are fine but leather is thirsty.

$25

Partial Relace

Replace broken web or finger laces and get safely back on the field fast.

$35+

Full Glove Overhaul

Complete lace replacement, deep conditioning, and total pocket reshaping.

$80+

Catcher / First Base Mitt

Heavy-duty specialized lacing for high-impact position gloves.

$110+

Vintage Restoration

For gloves that are well beyond basic maintenance — decades-old leather, broken-down structure, missing or deteriorated lace. Each one assessed individually and brought back with the care it deserves.

$150+
